main_themes: The 'Transactional Christianity' Trap: Surrendering to get a result vs. surrender for love.
Satan's 'Truth-Slip': Using history to poison your future confidence.
Legal Rights of Spirits: How recurring sin creates 'contracts' for demons to stay.
Submission to Authority: Childhood trauma causing adult resistance to God's leadership.
emotional_peaks: The audible realization: 'You're not repenting for love; you're doing it to stop the pain.'
The 'Thousand Elephants' moment of brief surrender.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: You aren't surrendering to God; you're just trying to bribe Him to take away your heartburn.
nuggets.proof_quote: You're only repenting so you don't have to feel the pain anymore. You're not repenting because you actually love me.

objection_bank.objection_text: I surrendered to God but He tricked me because I still lost her.
objection_bank.underlying_belief: Worship is a coin I put into a vending machine called God.
objection_bank.counter_truth_angle: Surrender with an agenda is a negotiation, not a surrender.

creator_notes.tone: Viciously insightful spiritual legalism. (V3 Reprocessed Output).
